recommendations.title: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home
recommendations.overview: When a huge alien probe enters the galaxy and begins to vaporize Earth's oceans, Kirk and his crew must travel back in time in order to bring back whales and save the planet.

recommendations.title: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock
recommendations.overview: A surprise visit from Spock's father provides a startling revelation: McCoy is harboring Spock's living essence.

recommendations.title: Atlantis: The Lost Empire
recommendations.overview: A young linguist named Milo Thatch joins an intrepid group of explorers to find the mysterious lost continent of Atlantis.

recommendations.title: Heyy Babyy
recommendations.overview: Three womanisers find a baby left at their doorstep. Chaos ensues as they try to contact their former girlfriends to determine who is the father amongst them.

recommendations.title: Instructions Not Included
recommendations.overview: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and him heading with her out of Mexico.

recommendations.title: The Pagemaster
recommendations.overview: Rich knows a lot about accidents. So much so, he is scared to do anything that might endanger him, like riding his bike, or climbing into his treehouse. While in an old library, he is mystically transported into the unknown world of books, and he has

recommendations.title: Miss You Already
recommendations.overview: The friendship between two life-long girlfriends is put to the test when one starts a family and the other falls ill.

recommendations.title: Mallrats
recommendations.overview: Both dumped by their girlfriends, two best friends seek refuge in the local mall. Eventually, they decide to try and win back their significant others and take care of their respective nemeses.

recommendations.title: Tangerines
recommendations.overview: War in Abkhazia, 1992. An Estonian man Ivo has stayed behind to harvest his crops of tangerines. In a bloody conflict at his door, a wounded man is left behind, and Ivo is forced to take him in.

recommendations.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
recommendations.overview: A renegade Vulcan with a startling secret hijacks the U.S.S. Enterprise in order to find a mythical planet.
